description: Address review feedback on [id] API routes: add permission gating, input validation for numeric fields, audit logging, and order status state machine guard.
steps: Add requirePerm calls to GET/PUT/DELETE in contracts, subscriptions, orders, quotes [id] routes
Add numeric validation for financial fields (totalValue, totalAmount, subtotal, discount, amount) in PUT handlers
Add logAudit calls to PUT and DELETE in all 4 routes
Add order status state machine guard in orders [id] PUT route
acceptance_criteria: All 4 routes use requirePerm for view/edit/delete permissions
PUT handlers validate numeric fields with parseFloat/isNaN checks, returning 400 on invalid input
PUT and DELETE handlers call logAudit with appropriate action names
Orders PUT validates status transitions against a defined state machine
